verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There was Adam in God's Eden, And yet all alone; Aching for some fellowship, With a kind of His own; Then he saw her, his bride, The one who came from his side, "Bone of my bone, flesh of my flesh," He cried.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What God hath joined together, No man can put asunder; There's no power that can ever Separate us from His Love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Calvary brought a union, The Blood in the Bride; Spirit of His Spirit, And Life of His Life. Satan tries so hard to take Her, But he doesn't understand, There's no power that can take Her From His hand.
